untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of 'near-term top/bottom' (local extrema identification), 'sizeable prior move' (trend strength assessment), and 'momentum pickup' analysis that cannot be precisely expressed with the allowed indicators. Pivot levels (r1/s1) used as proxy for resistance/support, but true signal intent requires multi-bar pattern recognition and momentum confirmation beyond available operators.
translation_notes: Entry uses tiny candles (body < atr_14 as proxy for small relative size) + price at key levels (pivot r1/s1). Exit uses larger candles of opposite color (body > prev_body AND bearish/bullish color). Direction marked CONTEXT_DEPENDENT per original signal specification. This is an approximation; author's exact candle sizing rules and momentum thresholds are not quantified.
